headline: JMGO’s N3 Ultimate projector is the new portable 4K champ
summary: The JMGO N3 Ultimate is rated as the new top portable 4K projector. It performs excellently in challenging light and severe angles, rivalling high-end home theater setups. Reviewers praised its adaptability and performance after weeks of testing.

headline: The first Story-Rich showcase was packed with narrative-driven games
summary: Fellow Traveller hosted its inaugural Story-Rich Showcase, highlighting numerous narrative-driven indie games. Over 20 games were featured, with several notable announcements. The event celebrates a growing focus on rich storytelling in gaming.

headline: GOG apologizes for emailing people Nazi symbols
summary: GOG mistakenly included Nazi SS symbols in a newsletter for 'The End of the Sun' game. The company cited miscommunication, font rendering issues, and understaffing as reasons for the error. GOG has issued an apology for the offensive content.

headline: The cutest games from the Wholesome Direct 2026 showcase
summary: The annual Wholesome Direct showcased over 50 'cute' and 'chill' indie games. It offered a refreshing contrast to the blockbuster showcases at Summer Game Fest. The event highlighted a diverse array of upcoming wholesome titles.

headline: New PowerWash Simulator 2: Star Wars Pack Trailer Spotlights Classic Locations
summary: A new trailer for PowerWash Simulator 2: Star Wars Pack DLC premiered at IGN Live. Players can clean iconic Star Wars grime, including a filthy Gonk droid. The DLC embraces the 'lived-in aesthetic' of the Star Wars universe.

headline: Masters of the Universe Movie Cast Reacts to Masters of the Universe: Legends Unite
summary: The cast of the Masters of the Universe movie reacted to the new 'Legends Unite' cooperative card game at IGN Live. Stars like Nicholas Galitzine and Camila Mendes saw their characters in the game. The actors also discussed their signature poses and personal gaming habits.

headline: Gears of War: E-Day PS5 Placeholder Listing Appears Online
summary: A placeholder listing for Gears of War: E-Day on PS5 appeared on Walmart's website. The listing surfaced just hours before Microsoft's 2026 Xbox Games Showcase. This hints at potential multi-platform releases for traditionally Xbox exclusive titles.

headline: Kara Arm Wrestles Some Aliens in an Exclusive New Supergirl Clip
summary: An exclusive clip from the upcoming Supergirl movie debuted at IGN Live. Kara/Supergirl is seen arm wrestling aliens in a bar to protect a young girl. The scene highlights Supergirl's strength and determination against unscrupulous characters.

headline: Delays to defence plan undermine UK credibility, MPs say
summary: MPs warn that delays to the UK's Defence Investment Plan are damaging national credibility. The plan is now expected to be released ahead of next month's Nato summit. Concerns are mounting over the strategic implications of these postponements.

headline: Hegseth attacks Europe over migration with beach 'invasion' D-Day speech
summary: US defence secretary Hegseth criticized Europe's migration policies in a controversial D-Day anniversary speech. His remarks, delivered in Normandy, invoked the term 'invasion'. The speech occurred 82 years after the Allied D-Day landings.

headline: Russia's economic forum overshadowed by drone attacks on St Petersburg
summary: Ukrainian drone attacks on St Petersburg overshadowed Russia's flagship economic forum. BBC's Russia editor Steve Rosenberg reported on the event's disruption. The incidents highlighted ongoing geopolitical tensions impacting economic gatherings.

headline: Starmer tells supporters he will fight any leadership contest
summary: Keir Starmer affirmed his readiness to contest any future Labour leadership challenge. His stance hardened after Andy Burnham expressed interest in a potential contest. The declaration signals an anticipated internal political battle within the Labour party.
